label: Facility comp
description: Comp properties for a facility building that links to adjacent things and provides stat offsets or effects.

statOffsets.label: Stat offsets
statOffsets.description: Flat stat offsets applied to linked things while this facility is active. Keys are StatDef defNames; values are float offsets.

maxSimultaneous.label: Max simultaneous
maxSimultaneous.description: Maximum number of things this facility can link to at the same time. Default 1.

mustBePlacedAdjacent.label: Must be placed adjacent
mustBePlacedAdjacent.description: Whether this facility must be directly adjacent to the things it links to.

mustBePlacedAdjacentCardinalToBedHead.label: Must be placed adjacent cardinal to bed head
mustBePlacedAdjacentCardinalToBedHead.description: Whether this facility must be placed in a cardinal direction adjacent to the head of a linked bed.

mustBePlacedAdjacentCardinalToAndFacingB.label: Must be placed adjacent cardinal to and facing bed head
mustBePlacedAdjacentCardinalToAndFacingB.description: Whether this facility must be placed cardinally adjacent to and rotated toward the head of a linked bed.

mustBePlacedFacingThingLinear.label: Must be placed facing thing linear
mustBePlacedFacingThingLinear.description: Whether this facility must be placed in a direct line facing the linked thing.

canLinkToMedBedsOnly.label: Can link to med beds only
canLinkToMedBedsOnly.description: Whether this facility can only link to medical beds.

maxDistance.label: Max distance
maxDistance.description: Maximum distance in cells at which this facility can link to a target. Default 8.

minDistance.label: Min distance
minDistance.description: Minimum distance in cells at which this facility can link to a target. Default 0.

showMaxSimultaneous.label: Show max simultaneous
showMaxSimultaneous.description: Whether to show the max simultaneous link count in the facility's inspect string. Default true.

requiresLOS.label: Requires line of sight
requiresLOS.description: Whether this facility requires line of sight to the things it links to. Default true.
